title: Shigeaki Mori, Hiroshima Survivor Photographed With Obama, Dies at 88
summary_full: He lived through the first atomic bombing in Japan and then spent decades researching the identities of 12 American P.O.W.s killed in the attack.
summary_public: He lived through the first atomic bombing in Japan and then spent decades researching the identities of 12 American P.O.W.s killed in the attack.
